## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated a test that fails without this change
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] Follows the project principles (zero runtime deps, one reactive model, no VDOM, compose don't duplicate, fail loud)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the DCO
